name: Jaipur, India
summary: The Pink City of Rajasthan, known for palaces, forts, bazaars, and vibrant culture.
tips: Carry water and sun protection during summer visits.
Many monuments open around 9 AM; plan mornings for forts.
Bargaining is common in local bazaars.

name: New York City, USA
summary: The Big Apple - iconic skyline, world-class attractions, Broadway shows, and diverse neighborhoods.
tips: Use subway for efficient transportation; get a MetroCard or OMNY.
Book Broadway shows and popular restaurants in advance.
Walk or use Uber/taxi for short distances in Manhattan.
